Acrobatics.entries.0: Stay on your feet in a tricky situation, or perform an acrobatic stunt.
Acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
Animal Handling.entries.0: Calm or train an animal, or get an animal to behave in a certain way.
Animal Handling.name: Animal Handling
Arcana.entries.0: Recall lore about spells, magic items, and the planes of existence.
Arcana.name: Arcana
Athletics.entries.0: Jump farther than normal, stay afloat in rough water, or break something.
Athletics.name: Athletics
Deception.entries.0: Tell a convincing lie, or wear a disguise convincingly.
Deception.name: Deception
History.entries.0: Recall lore about historical events, people, nations, and cultures.
History.name: History
Insight.entries.0: Discern a person's mood and intentions.
Insight.name: Insight
Intimidation.entries.0: Awe or threaten someone into doing what you want.
Intimidation.name: Intimidation
Investigation.entries.0: Find obscure information in books, or deduce how something works.
Investigation.name: Investigation
Medicine.entries.0: Diagnose an illness, or determine what killed the recently slain.
Medicine.name: Medicine
Nature.entries.0: Recall lore about terrain, plants, animals, and weather.
Nature.name: Nature
Perception.entries.0: Using a combination of senses, notice something that's easy to miss.
Perception.name: Perception
Performance.entries.0: Act, tell a story, perform music, or dance.
Performance.name: Performance
Persuasion.entries.0: Honestly and graciously convince someone of something.
Persuasion.name: Persuasion
Religion.entries.0: Recall lore about gods, religious rituals, and holy symbols.
Religion.name: Religion
Sleight of Hand.entries.0: Pick a pocket, conceal a handheld object, or perform legerdemain.
Sleight of Hand.name: Sleight of Hand
Stealth.entries.0: Escape notice by moving quietly and hiding behind things.
Stealth.name: Stealth
Survival.entries.0: Follow tracks, forage, find a trail, or avoid natural hazards.
Survival.name: Survival
